name: Whole Wheat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg.
2. Add the baking powder, milk, baking soda, oil, salt, and honey to the egg mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Heat a lightly oiled griddle or pan over medium heat.
4. Pour batter onto the hot griddle, using about 1/4 cup for each pancake.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges start to look dry, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Flip the pancakes once and cook the other side until golden brown, about 2 minutes more.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
